caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and a large, grey, cone-shaped wig sits in a podcast studio. He wears glasses and black over-ear headphones. A black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack featuring "LEE" branded apparel. A logo on the left side of the screen reads "THE PODCAST" with an icon, while text on the right reads "BOSS TALK JOY". Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly while looking toward someone off-camera. The lighting and setting remain consistent as he continues his conversation, with his mouth moving to indicate he is talking.
